/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.1 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MultilingualIR.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultilingualIR.dir/IRNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultilingualIR.dir/IREdge.cpp.o -o MultilingualIR
